component.name: MultiFlexi Microsoft 365
component.summary: Office 365 / SharePoint credential prototype for MultiFlexi

description.p: Provides the Office 365 / SharePoint credential prototype for MultiFlexi core, defining tenant, site, client id/secret and user credential fields. It performs a two-phase connection check (acquire a token, then a real SharePoint REST call) built on the php-spo library, preferring the modern Entra ID v2 client_credentials flow with a legacy ACS fallback.
Also ships a web UI component that renders the probe result, the working authentication flow and actionable diagnostics.
